hook_type: Loss-frame temporal contrast + '137,000 changed that' agency punch
tactic: Before-2018 stakes -> the crowd changed it -> the platform they built is raising -> waitlist
primary_text:
Before 2018, backing an early Aussie company meant being a VC. 137,000 Australians changed that.

The law opened up, Crowd-Sourced Funding arrived, and we built the rails. 324 raises followed: Naked Life, Our Cow, Earthletica, Aquafab. $234M+, none of it from VCs.

Now the platform they built is opening its own raise.

The waitlist is free. You read the offer document before you decide.

Save your spot. We will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: What only VCs used to access
description: Before 2018 you were locked out. 137,000 changed that.
_source_label: DRC V5 -- W6 Empathy + Access + Recursion (first-timers)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V4-A3 (V4 quality bar). Recursion close made referent-explicit.
_v5_rationale: Carries the validated V4-A3 loss-frame hook (Halbert 5/5 in --primary-text mode). '137,000 changed that' is the sharper agency punch (the crowd did the changing).

Recursion close rewritten to 'Now the platform they built is opening its own raise' (V4-A3 said 'the platform we built'). Both referents explicit: 'they' = the 137,000 investors (the builders); the platform = what is raising. Avoids the learnings anti-pattern of an ambiguous 'it'/'itself' carrying the recursion.
Brand grid identical to V4-A3 (Naked Life, Our Cow, Earthletica, Aquafab) for recency proof; all verified-good (RAISE-001/002/004/005).
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors who feel locked out of startup equity.
_compliance_findings_resolved: PREOFFER-VERBS: 'save your spot', 'we will tell you the moment', 'read'. No transaction verbs. 'backing' is gerund-factual; no now/today/here attached.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
BRAND-EXCLUDED: only verified-good raises (Naked Life, Our Cow, Earthletica RAISE-004, Aquafab RAISE-005).
Subject discipline: 'Birchal' appears zero times in body; 'the platform they built' + first-person we/our; recursion referents explicit (they = the 137,000 builders, platform = what is raising).
